settings.title: Settings
settings.pricingDesc: Manage node price display, exchange rate conversion, and credit-pack estimates.
settings.providerGuideText: Different providers vary in model capability, queue speed, stability, and pricing. Switch providers based on your task, and follow each provider's recommended parameters.
settings.nanoBananaProModelDesc: Switch the Nano Banana Pro endpoint for this provider. If one endpoint fails, try another one. See the <modelListLink>model list</modelListLink> for details.
settings.radiusPresetDesc: Control global corner style for panels, inputs, and nodes.
settings.themeToneDesc: Choose neutral, warm, or cool tint for both light and dark themes.
settings.edgeRoutingModeDesc: Switch edge path style between nodes, including orthogonal routing with automatic node avoidance.
settings.accentColorDesc: Used by buttons, selected borders, and interaction highlights.
settings.downloadPresetPathsDesc: Used by node toolbar download menu for quick-save directories (up to 8).
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistent: Keep storyboard style aligned with references
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistentDesc: When enabled, storyboard generation prompt appends "图片风格与参考图保持一致".
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImage: Disallow descriptive text in storyboard image
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImageDesc: When enabled, storyboard generation prompt appends "禁止添加描述文本".
settings.ignoreAtTagWhenCopyingAndGeneratingDesc: When enabled, copied text and embedded storyboard metadata remove tags like "@图1"; generation requests only remove "@" and keep "图1".
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitle: Use uploaded filename as node title
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitleDesc: When enabled, newly uploaded images use the file name as the node title by default (still editable via double-click).
settings.groupNodesShortcutDesc: Customize the shortcut used to group selected nodes on the canvas.
settings.shortcutPressNew: Press a key combination now. Press Esc to cancel.
settings.downloadPathPlaceholder: Input folder path, e.g. /Users/name/Pictures/Storyboard or D:\\Images\\Storyboard
settings.getApiKeyLink: click here to get API key
settings.scriptApiDesc: Select the API provider for script generation
settings.storyboardApiDesc: Select the API provider for storyboard generation
settings.missingAnyApiKeyMessage: You have not configured any API keys yet. Please open Settings to configure one.
settings.aboutIntro: An AI storyboard workstation based on a node canvas for generation, editing, and storyboard workflows.
settings.autoCheckUpdateOnLaunchDesc: Check for updates once every time the app starts.
settings.enableUpdateDialogDesc: Show a custom dialog when a new version is detected.
settings.enableStoryboardGenGridPreviewShortcutDe: When enabled, holding Ctrl + Alt + Shift and clicking Generate on storyboard generation creates a grid preview node without sending AI request.
settings.showStoryboardGenAdvancedRatioControlsDe: When enabled, show cell/overall ratio info and the Overall/Cell mode switch. When disabled, storyboard generation uses cell-ratio mode by default.
settings.storyboardGenAutoInferEmptyFrameDesc: When enabled, empty storyboard cells automatically append "依据之前的内容进行推测" during generation prompt construction.
settings.showNodePrice: Show node price in the header
settings.showNodePriceDesc: Continuously estimate the current run cost from the selected model, resolution, and extra options.
settings.priceDisplayCurrencyModeDesc: In auto mode, Chinese uses CNY and English uses USD.
settings.usdToCnyRateDesc: Used only for price display conversion between USD and CNY. It does not change actual provider billing.
settings.preferDiscountedPriceDesc: Currently this only applies to KIE. The discounted domestic pricing usually needs to be requested from KIE separately; when enabled, estimates prefer that discounted rate.
settings.grsaiCreditTierDesc: GRSAI bills in credits, so the per-run estimate changes with your top-up pack.
settings.checkUpdateUpToDate: You are on the latest version.
settings.checkUpdateFailed: Update check failed. Please try again later.
settings.projectStoragePathDesc: Change the storage location for project database and image files. Existing data will be automatically migrated to the new location.
settings.psIntegrationEnabledDesc: Allow image data exchange with Photoshop plugin
settings.psServerPortDesc: Port number for PS integration server (1024-65535)
settings.psAutoStartServerDesc: Automatically start PS integration server when app launches
settings.psPluginPortDesc: Use port {{port}} in the Photoshop plugin panel
settings.psPortAutoAdjusted: Preferred port {{requested}} was occupied, so the app switched to {{actual}} automatically
settings.aboutPsPortDesc: Shows the actual port currently used by the app so you can keep the plugin panel in sync.
settings.releaseNotesDesc: Review what changed in each version. Starting from 0.1.16, new releases will be tracked here.

added.batchImageExport: Selected images on the canvas can now be exported in batches into a timestamped folder, both inside and outside groups.

optimized.imageEditDefaults: AI image nodes now remember the last selected provider and size when creating new nodes.
optimized.generatedNodeSpacing: Generated AI image result nodes now stack more compactly to reduce empty canvas space.
optimized.groupOverlayExport: Multi-selection overlays inside groups now position correctly, keeping batch export consistent with selections outside groups.

fixed.parallelImageBranches: Fixed the issue where consecutive AI image nodes dragged from the same image were chained instead of created as parallel branches.
fixed.manualImageRefresh: Fixed interrupted AI image result retrieval after long waits or app restarts, and added a manual refresh action.
fixed.videoPersistence: Fixed the issue where video nodes could not be reopened after restarting the app.

added.groupShortcut: Added customizable group shortcut settings in Settings.
added.groupSidebar: Added a groups sidebar for quickly locating groups on the canvas.
added.releaseNotes: Added a release notes section in Settings to keep tracking version changes.

optimized.generatedNodeLayout: AI image generation nodes and split result nodes now align into cleaner columns.
optimized.groupAutoArrange: Groups can now be manually auto-arranged from left to right based on flow direction.
optimized.dragIntoGroup: Nodes can now be dragged directly into a group area and become part of that group.
optimized.spacePanWhileConnecting: While dragging a connection, holding Space now pans the canvas so you can reach distant nodes.

fixed.groupSidebarReopen: Fixed the issue where the groups sidebar could not be reopened after collapsing.
fixed.groupAltDuplicate: Fixed Alt-drag duplication for nodes inside groups.

update.dialogDescription: A new version is available. Do you want to download it now?
update.ignoreTodayVersion: Do not remind this version today

script.importChapterCountDesc: Please enter the number of chapters, empty chapter nodes will be created accordingly
script.expandFromSummaryDesc: Generate complete script content based on chapter summary
